====Pokémon====
This listing is for Whitney's Pokémon in the Ash & Pikachu manga.

{{anchor|Nidorina 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|width=85

|pkmn=Nidorina

|img=Whitney Nidorina AP.png

|desc=Whitney uses {{p|Nidorina}} in her battle against Ash. She commands Nidorina to attack, but she trips over {{p|Psyduck}}, the impact of which causes her to faint, losing the round.

None of Nidorina's moves are known.}}

{{anchor|Clefairy 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Whitney
|pkmn=Clefairy
|type1=Normal
|img=Whitney Clefairy AP.png
|epnum=SP02
|epname=The Beginning Of Good Luck?! Pokémon Fortune Telling
|desc=Whitney uses {{p|Clefairy}} in her battle against Ash. Whitney commands Clefairy to use {{m|Metronome}}, but then Clefairy starts jumping around, out of control. Deemed to have lost the will to battle, Clefairy lost the round.

Clefairy's only known move is {{m|Metronome}}.}}
